description: Azure DevOps MCP Server - work items, pipelines, repos, wikis, and search for Azure DevOps organizations.
capabilities: Work item CRUD (Bugs, Tasks, User Stories, Features, Epics)
Git repository operations (branches, PRs, commits, file content)

authentication.notes: Authenticate via `az login` before starting. Uses your Azure CLI session token.

remote_variant.description: HTTP-based MCP endpoint for orgs that have it enabled.

prerequisites: Access to target Azure DevOps organization
setup.install: No installation required - npx downloads on first use
